message:
Fix 5 issues from plan review round 3

- Clear _connectedWindows in disable() to prevent stale refs on re-enable
- Add _windowById Map cache to avoid O(n^2) actor scans in hot paths
- Fix _onDropFullSize to handle occupied target cells (falls back to best-fit)
- Fix shelf placer row math for multi-row stamps (was placing out of bounds)
- Document tiled state preservation as deferred follow-up

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
